reason: Verify Pinia listener routing upgrade is idempotent (start() can be called twice without double-fire) + 200ms debounce buffer semantics unchanged + reactive Map.set triggers Vue updates — core contracts of subagentRuns.ts
Verify SubagentDrawer DialogContent still wraps in DialogRoot/DialogPortal correctly + scoped CSS via data-v-* preserved selector (no :deep() needed for body ref) — guards against portal regression
Verify all new color usages reference --color-* tokens (no hardcoded hex) + shape consistency (radius 4px / 6px ladder) + waiting visual reuses tool-card--subagent palette
Verify race analysis still holds against the documented flow (insert_run before nested run_chat_loop; subagent:event emitted from SubagentBufferSink.record per emit) — guards against backend drift
Verify list_subagent_runs_by_session returns SubagentRunSummary (camelCase) + get_subagent_run returns SubagentRunRow (raw status string + transcript_json snake_case payload_json) — drift trap 1 + 2
Verify subagent:event payload shape unchanged: {runId, sessionId, kind: chat_event|tool_call|tool_result|permission_ask, payload, timestamp} — eager-fetch path must not assume shape changes
Verify dispatch_subagent ToolDef name/schema unchanged — front-end ToolCallCard.isDispatchSubagent name match must stay lockstep
Cross-check: store's payload camelCase -> TranscriptEntry.payload_json snake_case unification (Drift trap 2) still applied consistently in the new eager-fetch code path
Ensure RULE-D tracking is current — any new debt surfaced by this PR (e.g. if polling fallback reveals a deeper issue) needs DEBT.md entry + close-back reference
